hyperedges.label: PH E2E Test Harness — Four Coordinated Modules
Portal Dual Auth: External API Key + Internal SA Token via Single Gateway
Manifest-Driven Lifecycle: manifest controls phases, portal and Jira consume
Two-Boundary Auth Model (API Key + SA Token protecting MCP and RCARS)
Portal Backend Stack (FastAPI + FastMCP + PostgreSQL on OpenShift)
PH State Management Core (Manifest + Orchestrator + Content Lifecycle)
PH Multi-Plugin Package (Four Plugins Consolidated in One Repo)
Automation Phase 7 Pipeline (SKILL.md + Manifest + AgnosticV Form Automation Flow)
Portal Integration Stack (Backend + MCP Server + RCARS Form External Gateway)
PH Content Creation Lifecycle (intake → write → edit → orchestrate)
Automation Sub-Phase Pipeline (requirements → catalog → code → test)
Spec Creation Reference Set (template + outline + guidelines → design spec)
Publishing House Content Lifecycle Pipeline (Orchestrator + Writer + Worklog + Phases)
E2E Test Harness Pattern (Testing Suite + Seeder + Tester Sub-Agents)
Showroom Antora Build Configuration (site.yml + ui-config.yml + antora.yml)
Onboarded Mode Test Suite (Three Product Fixtures)
Self-Published Mode Test Suite (Five Product Fixtures)
MCP Portal API Mock Contract (RCARS + Portal Tools)
